moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 enters its thrilling Quarter-Final stage, with matches scheduled from July 9-11 across North America.

angles.name: Quarter-Final Hype
angles.copy: The biggest football tournament on the planet heats up! The FIFA World Cup Quarter-Finals are here. Who are you backing to make the semis? #WorldCup2026

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing its third heatwave of the year, with temperatures in parts of England and Wales expected to reach 35-36°C on Thursday and Friday.

angles.name: Sizzling UK
angles.copy: Another heatwave is here! Temperatures could hit 36°C this week. Stay cool and hydrated out there, UK! #UKHeatwave

angles.name: Devon Heat Alert
angles.copy: Devon, get ready for scorching temperatures! This week's heatwave means highs could reach into the mid-30s. How are you keeping cool in Exeter? #DevonHeat

angles.name: Wales Sun Safety
angles.copy: The heatwave is hitting Wales! Expect temperatures well over 30°C. Remember to protect yourself from the sun and check on vulnerable neighbours. #WalesHeat

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Season 13 of Love Island UK continues nightly at 9 PM BST on ITV2 and ITVX, with the series finale expected in late July.

angles.name: Island Drama
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island? The drama continues tonight at 9 PM! Who's your favourite couple (or least favourite)? #LoveIslandUK

moments.title: Wireless Festival Returns to London
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival takes over Finsbury Park, London from July 10-12, with Kanye West (Ye) headlining all three nights.

angles.name: Wireless Weekend
angles.copy: London, get ready! Wireless Festival kicks off this Friday with Ye headlining. Who's making the trip to Finsbury Park? #WirelessFestival

angles.name: Ye Live in London
angles.copy: Ye takes centre stage at Wireless Festival all weekend! Expect an epic three nights in London. What tracks are you hoping to hear? #YeWireless

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The rock and alternative festival 2000trees is happening now in Gloucestershire, running until July 11th.

angles.name: Rocking Gloucestershire
angles.copy: Headbangers unite! 2000trees Festival is in full swing in Gloucestershire. Who's there and who are you most excited to see? #2000trees

moments.title: Boogietown Festival in London
moments.blurb: London's Boogietown Festival brings a day of dance music to the capital this Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Get Your Boogie On
angles.copy: Boogietown Festival is hitting London this Saturday! Get ready for a day of non-stop grooves and epic dance anthems. #Boogietown

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Ally Pally
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace Park, London this Saturday, July 11th, offering music, arts, and family entertainment.

angles.name: Ally Pally Fun
angles.copy: Alexandra Palace is hosting Kaleidoscope Festival this Saturday! Music, arts, and good vibes for all. Who's heading to Ally Pally? #KaleidoscopeFestival

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival in Newcastle
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival brings electronic music to Newcastle this Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Newcastle Dance
angles.copy: Newcastle, get ready to lose your minds! Lost Minds Festival is this Saturday with a massive electronic lineup. Who's joining the party? #LostMinds

moments.title: Also Festival in Warwickshire
moments.blurb: Also Festival, a blend of music, arts, and ideas, takes place in Warwickshire from July 10-12.

angles.name: Festival of Ideas
angles.copy: More than just music! Also Festival is on this weekend in Warwickshire, combining great tunes with big ideas. What's your favourite festival experience? #AlsoFestival

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Beck!
moments.blurb: Genre-bending artist Beck, known for hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At', celebrates his 56th birthday today.

angles.name: Celebrating Beck
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one and only Beck! A true musical chameleon. What's your go-to Beck track? #Beck #Birthday

moments.title: Happy 28th Birthday, Jaden Smith!
moments.blurb: Rapper, actor, and fashion icon Jaden Smith turns 28 today, continuing to make waves in music and culture.

angles.name: Jaden's Big Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 28th Birthday to Jaden Smith! From acting to music, he's always pushing boundaries. What's your favourite Jaden track? #JadenSmith

moments.title: Happy 28th Birthday, Maya Hawke!
moments.blurb: Actress and singer-songwriter Maya Hawke, known for 'Stranger Things' and her indie folk music, celebrates her 28th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Maya
angles.copy: Happy 28th Birthday to the multi-talented Maya Hawke! Whether on screen or through her music, she's a star. What's your favourite of her songs? #MayaHawke

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Underway
moments.blurb: For many schools across the UK, the summer holidays have begun or are starting this week, marking the start of a long break for students.

angles.name: Schools Out!
angles.copy: No more pencils, no more books! Summer holidays are here for many students across the UK. What are your big plans for the break? #SummerHolidays

angles.name: Devon Summer Break
angles.copy: The summer holidays are kicking off in Devon! Long days, sunny skies (hopefully!), and plenty of time for fun. What's first on your summer bucket list? #DevonSummer
